actions.value:
In order to send a Solana token, for example USDT, USDC... you'll first need a bit of SOL to pay the gas (or mining) fees.
This is a Solana policy, not an Edge one. We receive no profit from these gas fees. They are paid solely to Solana network validators to process your transaction on-chain.


Tokens can NOT pay for their own fees.


This policy also applies to exchanges, so if you want to swap a Solana token into anything else (for example USDT to SOL), you'll need some SOL beforehand to cover the gas fees. 


Please let us know if you have any more questions.
